queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS join_row_count,
       COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS count_l_orderkey,
       COUNT(l.lineitem_replica_id) AS count_lineitem_replica_id,
       COUNT(l.l_linenumber) AS count_l_linenumber,
       COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS count_o_orderkey,
       COUNT(o.orders_replica_id) AS count_orders_replica_id,
       COUNT(o.o_custkey) AS count_o_custkey,
       COUNT(o.o_orderstatus) AS count_o_orderstatus,
       COUNT(o.o_totalprice) AS count_o_totalprice,
       COUNT(o.o_orderdate) AS count_o_orderdate,
       COUNT(o.o_orderpriority) AS count_o_orderpriority,
       COUNT(o.o_clerk) AS count_o_clerk,
       COUNT(o.o_shippriority) AS count_o_shippriority,
       COUNT(o.o_comment) AS count_o_comment
FROM scale.lineitem_25x l
INNER JOIN scale.orders_scale_04 o
  ON CAST(CAST(l.l_orderkey AS BIGINT) * 4 + CAST((l.l_suppkey % 4) AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT) = o.join_key

theorem.description: Join scale test with lineitem fixed at 25x and orders scaled to 4x
theorem.name: EE-JOIN-SCALE-04
